name: rls_policy_always_true
title: RLS Policy Always True
description: Detects RLS policies that use overly permissive expressions like \`USING (true)\` or \`WITH CHECK (true)\` for UPDATE, DELETE, or INSERT operations. SELECT policies with \`USING (true)\` are intentionally excluded as this pattern is often used deliberately for public read access.
detail: Table `public.parental_consent_log` has an RLS policy `parental_consent_log_insert_anon` for `INSERT` that allows unrestricted access (WITH CHECK clause is always true). This effectively bypasses row-level security for anon.

name: rls_policy_always_true
title: RLS Policy Always True
description: Detects RLS policies that use overly permissive expressions like \`USING (true)\` or \`WITH CHECK (true)\` for UPDATE, DELETE, or INSERT operations. SELECT policies with \`USING (true)\` are intentionally excluded as this pattern is often used deliberately for public read access.
detail: Table `public.parental_consent_tokens` has an RLS policy `parental_consent_tokens_update_anon` for `UPDATE` that allows unrestricted access (both USING and WITH CHECK are always true). This effectively bypasses row-level security for anon.

name: rls_policy_always_true
title: RLS Policy Always True
description: Detects RLS policies that use overly permissive expressions like \`USING (true)\` or \`WITH CHECK (true)\` for UPDATE, DELETE, or INSERT operations. SELECT policies with \`USING (true)\` are intentionally excluded as this pattern is often used deliberately for public read access.
detail: Table `public.students` has an RLS policy `students_update_consent_anon` for `UPDATE` that allows unrestricted access (both USING and WITH CHECK are always true). This effectively bypasses row-level security for anon.

name: auth_leaked_password_protection
title: Leaked Password Protection Disabled
description: Leaked password protection is currently disabled.
detail: Supabase Auth prevents the use of compromised passwords by checking against HaveIBeenPwned.org. Enable this feature to enhance security.
